name: field-radio
visual_summary: The field-radio component is a radio button group used for selecting one option from multiple choices. It typically consists of a set of labeled buttons, where only one button can be selected at a time. This component is useful for multiple-choice scenarios.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready form component with the following characteristics:

Name: field-radio
Description: The field-radio component is a radio button group used for selecting one option from multiple choices. It typically consists of a set of labeled buttons, where only one button can be selected at a time. This component is useful for multiple-choice scenarios.
Style: e.g. minimal
Interactions: e.g. clickable, hover
Tags: radio-buttons, group-selection, single-select

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
